name: Classic Manicure
description: Includes nail shaping, cuticle care, and regular polish.

name: Gel Manicure
description: Chip-resistant gel polish with a high-gloss finish.

name: Acrylic Full Set
description: Full set of acrylic extensions with regular polish.

name: Acrylic Fill-In
description: Refill for acrylic nails with shaping and polish.

name: Dip Powder Nails
description: Lightweight and durable nails using powder dips.

name: Spa Pedicure
description: Includes exfoliation, massage, cuticle care, and polish.

name: Gel Pedicure
description: Long-lasting gel polish with a complete pedicure service.

name: Nail Art Add-On
description: Custom nail designs, rhinestones, or decals (add-on).

name: French Tips
description: Classic French tip design on any manicure style.

name: Paraffin Wax Treatment
description: Warm wax treatment for softening hands or feet.

name: Nail Repair (Per Nail)
description: Fix broken or cracked nails with reinforcement gel.

name: Cuticle Care Only
description: Quick cuticle cleaning and nourishing treatment.
